quote: Three guys, three MCs, all dated Monday. Always Monday.
He claimed bird's nest as 'medication'. I claimed his bonus.
Took the deposit. Took the uniform. Took the next day off forever.
I have seen the same fake MC twice. Different name. Same handwriting.
Q4 hits and suddenly the whole roster has flu.
He cleared his medical leave by 30 December. Three years running.
He didn't no-show. He no-call-no-showed. There's a difference.
Sent his cousin to cover his shift. The cousin spoke a different language.
Promised the shift on Friday. Phone off Saturday morning. Phone on Monday.
Two agencies have already flagged him. He's interviewing at a third.
